title: renderer parity workspace-root and byteLength normalizer CI repair

repairedCiRun.failure: artifactIntakePreflight length drift on Linux runner
repairedCiRun.rootCause: v2172 normalized entry-rendered digest fields, but artifact intake preflight still emitted JSON path objects for sibling workspace roots without a trailing slash and JSON file-reference objects using byteLength/digest instead of sizeBytes/digest. Those values are checkout-local evidence metadata and must not remain in renderer migration parity hashes.

addedInV2173: JSON file-reference metadata matching exists=true, byteLength=<number>, digest=<sha256>

verification.fullLocalSuitePolicy: remote GitHub CI remains the accepted full coverage gate; local verification focuses on the repaired parity surface, typecheck, docs quality, lint, and build before push

parallelPlanning.reason: v2173 only repairs Node migration parity tests and local documentation. It consumes no fresh sibling evidence and changes no cross-project contract.
